subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-04-29
subcodes.first_line: This is the ninth Ridván, the Festival of the Ancient Beauty, the Festival of the dawning of the Sun of Truth, the Most Great Festival [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نهم عید رضوانست عید جمال قدم است عید طلوع شمس حقیقت است عید بسیار بزرگ
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @transcendence; unknowability of God
